settings.question: What exactly is DairyAssure?
settings.answer: Pure lactase enzyme powder in portable stick packs. Lactase is the enzyme your body needs to digest dairy — we just give you more of it. One ingredient, no fillers, no preservatives. Sprinkle it on your food or mix it into your drink.

settings.question: How is this different from lactase pills?
settings.answer: Pills are loaded with fillers, binders, and coatings your body doesn't need. DairyAssure is just the enzyme — nothing else. And because it's a powder you add directly to food, there's no timing to worry about. No swallowing pills 30 minutes before eating. Sprinkle it on and eat.

settings.question: How do I use it?
settings.answer: Tear open a stick pack and sprinkle the powder on your food or mix it into your drink right before you eat. That's it. No water needed, no pills to swallow, no planning ahead.

settings.question: Is DairyAssure safe for children?
settings.answer: Yes. DairyAssure is a single-ingredient powder suitable for children, adults, and seniors. It simply supplements the lactase enzyme your body doesn't produce enough of. Sprinkle it on their food — it's flavorless, so they won't even notice.

settings.question: How long does it last?
settings.answer: DairyAssure provides 90+ minutes of effectiveness — enough to last through your entire meal and beyond.

settings.question: Can I use it with any dairy product?
settings.answer: Yes. Coffee, pizza, ice cream, cheese, yogurt, protein shakes — DairyAssure works with all dairy. It's completely flavorless, so it won't change the taste of your food.

settings.question: Is it really just one ingredient?
settings.answer: Yes. DairyAssure contains only lactase enzyme. Nothing else. No preservatives, no fillers, no additives, no artificial flavors. We believe one problem needs one solution — not a cocktail of unnecessary extras.

settings.question: Some brands have multiple enzymes. Why does DairyAssure only have one?
settings.answer: Lactose is what causes the discomfort. Lactase is what breaks it down. One problem, one solution. We don't add extra enzymes to justify a higher price or create the illusion of complexity. We give you exactly what your body needs — pure, effective lactase at the right dose.

settings.question: Is it worth the cost compared to generic pills?
settings.answer: A stick pack costs about the price of a coffee — and gives you an entire meal of dairy freedom with zero fillers. Generic pills are cheap because they're packed with binders and additives your body doesn't need. DairyAssure is pure enzyme, in a format that actually fits your life.

settings.question: What does 'doctor recommended' mean?
settings.answer: Lactase enzyme supplementation is widely recommended by gastroenterologists as a first-line approach for managing lactose intolerance. DairyAssure delivers pure lactase without the fillers, preservatives, or additives found in most supplement pills — the kind of clean formulation healthcare professionals prefer.

settings.question: How should I store DairyAssure?
settings.answer: Store in a cool, dry place. No refrigeration needed. The stick packs are shelf-stable and designed to go wherever you go.

settings.question: Is DairyAssure gluten-free?
settings.answer: Yes. DairyAssure contains only lactase enzyme. No gluten, no dairy, no soy, no nuts, no common allergens.

settings.question: Can I take it with hot food or drinks?
settings.answer: Yes. DairyAssure works with hot and cold foods and beverages. Sprinkle it into your coffee, soup, pizza — anything with dairy.

settings.question: How many stick packs should I use per meal?
settings.answer: One stick pack per meal is typically sufficient. For very dairy-heavy meals, you may use two. Everyone's sensitivity level is different, so adjust to what works best for you.

settings.question: What's the difference between Single Strength and Extra Strength?
settings.answer: Single Strength (10,000 FCC) is ideal for mild to moderate lactose sensitivity. Extra Strength (20,000 FCC) provides double the lactase enzyme for those with higher sensitivity or dairy-heavy meals.

settings.question: Do you offer subscriptions?
settings.answer: We're working on a subscribe-and-save option. Sign up for our newsletter to be the first to know when it launches.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 100% money-back guarantee. If DairyAssure doesn't work for you, contact us and we'll refund every penny. No questions asked.

settings.question: Where is DairyAssure made?
settings.answer: DairyAssure is made in the USA in an FDA-registered, GMP-certified facility.
